Terms of Use

Last updated: July 2026

By using FinCalc Lab, you agree to these terms.

Educational purpose only

All calculators, articles and other content on this site are provided for general educational and informational purposes only. Nothing on this site constitutes financial, investment, tax, accounting or legal advice, and nothing should be relied upon as such.

Financial decisions depend on personal circumstances we cannot know. Before acting on anything you calculate or read here, consult a qualified professional licensed in your jurisdiction.

Accuracy and warranties

We work hard to keep formulas correct and content current, but we provide the site "as is", without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that results are error-free, complete, or suited to your situation. Rates, tax rules and market conditions change; calculators use simplified models by design.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, FinCalc Lab and its operator shall not be liable for any loss or damage arising from the use of, or reliance on, this site or its results.

Acceptable use

You may use the calculators freely for personal, educational or internal business purposes. You may not:

  • copy substantial portions of the site's content for republication without permission;
  • use automated tools to scrape, overload or disrupt the site;
  • misrepresent our content as professional advice to third parties.

Quoting brief excerpts with a link back is welcome.

Intellectual property

The site's original text, design and code are the property of FinCalc Lab. Standard financial formulas are, of course, public knowledge — our explanations and implementations are what we claim.

Advertising

The site displays third-party advertising, which funds free access. Advertisers do not influence calculator logic or editorial content.

Changes

We may revise these terms by posting an updated version on this page. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

Contact

Questions about these terms: contact@fincalclab.com.

FinCalc Lab

Free, fast and honest financial calculators. All tools run entirely in your browser — we never see or store your numbers.

About Contact Privacy Policy Terms of Use

© 2026 FinCalc Lab. All calculators and articles are for educational purposes only and do not constitute financial advice. Consult a qualified professional before making financial decisions.
